The '''''Bastion''''' was a transport [[Starship/Legends|ship]] used by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Chamma]] and his team of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during their mission to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Athiss/Legends|Athiss]].

{{Ship-stub}}
